articles.author: Al Jazeera Staff
articles.title: ‘Now or never’: Students defy Delhi lockdown to march on India’s parliament - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Youth-led protesters answer call of Cockroach Janta Party to demand accountability, sweeping reforms after exam scandal.
articles.content:
After two days of preparations, 18-year-old Anshuka Ruth Das set out early on Monday with a mission: To reach the Jantar Mantar protest site in the heart of Indias capital, New Delhi.
